case_title: REINA B. SAGHAFI VS. SHAHZAD B. SAGHAFI

calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Regina Dennis/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead

Petitioner: Reina B. Saghafi was present in pro per and sworn.

Respondent: Shahzad B. Saghafi was present in pro per and sworn.

Witness: Barry White and Maria Mendez, were sworn.

The Court hears testimony and the Petitioner's order is Granted. The Court cannot try to solve the family problems.

Expires: October 17, 2012. Order signed.
